reviews.review_description: Why the letters are opposite 😕 and how to change the game language???

developer_response.body:
Hello raad2304,
sorry that you experienced a problem. I think you are referring to the placement order in the Tutorial section ("Buchstaben lernen"). You are right we placed it from left to right for beginners understanding it easier. Probably it would be better to place them from right to left. We will replace them that way in our next Update. Thank you for your feedback.

In the main games the letters are spawning correctly, as far as we can see.

As for the language selection, we are already working on a major update with chapter 2 and 3 and the possibility of changing the language to Turkish and English. The first development was mainly planned for German customers. 

Stay tuned :)
